summary: Review third-party skills for risk, permissions, and suspicious behavior before installation.
Scan skills for malware, exfiltration patterns, miners, and suspicious code before install.
Audit code and auth flows for common web vulnerabilities and OWASP-class issues.
Set up 1Password CLI workflows for reading, injecting, and managing secrets.
Add guardrails against prompt injection, data exfiltration, and other malicious skill behavior.
